prediction_outcome: Scenario B closest (position-dependent) but direction REVERSED (early most destructive, not late). Scenario A (position-independent replicates) DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED.
key_finding: H5 position-independence is QWEN-SPECIFIC. Llama H5 range=50.8pp (vs Qwen 9.3pp): early=18.6%=all (cascading), late=69.5%. 30:0 concordance. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent: digital decouples, analog couples.
evidence_impact: Added findings #59-61. Revised #52-54. Disconfirmed head-position orthogonality as universal. Updated narrative synthesis.
next_planned: Test whether cascading is H5-specific or general (other heads at position bands) OR comprehensive final synthesis

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama. Head x position ENCODING-DEPENDENT.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent: orthogonal on Qwen (digital), coupled on Llama (analog). Early positions dominate on analog models.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. V=456/456 absolute. TRIPLE-CONFIRMED.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama (disconfirmatory). Head x position encoding-dependent. H5 position-independent on Qwen, position-dependent on Llama.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 variants. Head x position on 2 models. Encoding-dependent interaction discovered.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + explains head x position interaction: digital=orthogonal, analog=coupled. Causally explained by architectural depth dynamics.
